active_parallel_roots.reason: Primary governance checkout remains on an unrelated dirty branch; issue-587 planning stays isolated in this clean worktree.
Stampede remains replay-only proof for source governance enforcement.

routing_gate.rule: Bidirectional Codex <> Claude pinned-agent dispatch is required.
routing_gate.codex_primary_requirement: If Codex is primary, Claude-owned pinned roles must be dispatched through the governed Claude path.
routing_gate.claude_primary_requirement: If Claude is primary, Codex-owned pinned roles must be dispatched through the governed Codex path.
routing_gate.absorption_forbidden: Neither side may absorb the other side's pinned role.
